parents.subject: LU-14134 osd-ldiskfs: reduce credits for new writing

commit.subject: LU-14140 osd: don't panic meeting OI dups
commit.message:
LU-14140 osd: don't panic meeting OI dups

instead dump all info (FID->ino, LMAs) and return an error

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
